one_time_description: Write-down of investments (48North Cannabis Corp. and others) due to non-temporary decline in market value
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Wahgoshig Resources LP, Little Fox Lodge LP, Niiwin LP, Wahgoshig Energy LP, Mashkiki Investment LP, and related corporations. Distribution from Little Fox Lodge Limited Partnership of $1,297,411 and Niiwin Limited Partnership of $100,000 received in 2020.
notes: Large 'Other' revenue of $11,346,009 in 2020 vs $4,593,745 in 2019 is unusual and likely includes distributions from LPs and other business activities. Write-down of investments of $3,347,384 primarily related to 48North Cannabis Corp. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Capital lease obligations of $47,827 exist. Advance to Wahgoshig Resources Limited Partnership of $144,000. Consolidated revenue trust funds of $398,699 held in Ottawa Trust accounts under Indian Act.
